title: I want to automatically categorize items by language based on the text in the another column. What is the trigger I can use
excerpt: I want to automatically categorize items by language based on the text in the another column. Ex: If the Column contains EN in the Name, then the status should change to English. Same for FR to French, ES to Spanish and …

posts.author: Mohan11 (Mohan)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to automatically categorize items by language based on the text in the another column. Ex: If the Column contains EN in the Name, then the status should change to English. Same for FR to French, ES to Spanish and DE to German. How to do this? Please help me here!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: What type of column is FR/SP etc?
